title: SkullShade
description: Fast and smooth Fabric PvP modpack for Minecraft 1.21.11
body:
SkullShade is a lightweight Minecraft 1.21.11 modpack focused on PvP, performance, and smooth gameplay.
It is built for players who want better FPS, lower input delay, cleaner visuals, and useful combat-oriented improvements without unnecessary clutter.

This pack keeps Minecraft fast and responsive while adding carefully selected mods for optimization, PvP comfort, and a sharper overall experience.
Perfect for duels, practice, minigames, crystal PvP, sword PvP, and everyday multiplayer.

Features:

FPS optimization

smoother gameplay

reduced lag and stuttering

PvP-focused improvements

cleaner and more responsive experience

lightweight and practical mod selection

better performance for multiplayer servers

Minecraft version: 1.21.11
Platform: Fabric
Focus: PvP / Optimization / Performance
